params.arg0:
FROM logs-system.auth-*
| WHERE @timestamp >= "2026-05-25T13:38:00Z" AND @timestamp < "2026-05-25T13:53:00Z"
        AND user.name == "dev.dana"
        AND host.name == "db-1"
        AND event.outcome IS NOT NULL
| STATS accepted   = COUNT(*) WHERE event.outcome == "success",
        failed     = COUNT(*) WHERE event.outcome == "failure",
        first_seen = MIN(@timestamp),
        last_seen  = MAX(@timestamp)
        BY auth_method = CASE(message LIKE "*publickey*", "publickey",
                              message LIKE "*password*",  "password", "other"),
           source.ip
| SORT accepted DESC

raw_command:
esql 'FROM logs-system.auth-*
| WHERE @timestamp >= "2026-05-25T13:38:00Z" AND @timestamp < "2026-05-25T13:53:00Z"
        AND user.name == "dev.dana"
        AND host.name == "db-1"
        AND event.outcome IS NOT NULL
| STATS accepted   = COUNT(*) WHERE event.outcome == "success",
        failed     = COUNT(*) WHERE event.outcome == "failure",
        first_seen = MIN(@timestamp),
        last_seen  = MAX(@timestamp)
        BY auth_method = CASE(message LIKE "*publickey*", "publickey",
                              message LIKE "*password*",  "password", "other"),
           source.ip
| SORT accepted DESC'
payload_digest: 2 rows; dev.dana@db-1 incident window: publickey accepted=3; password failed=128

params.arg0:
FROM logs-system.auth-*
| WHERE @timestamp >= "2026-05-25T13:38:00Z" AND @timestamp < "2026-05-25T13:53:00Z"
        AND host.name == "db-1" AND event.outcome == "failure"
| STATS failed = COUNT(*),
        distinct_srcs = COUNT_DISTINCT(source.ip),
        first_seen = MIN(@timestamp),
        last_seen  = MAX(@timestamp)
        BY user.name
| SORT failed DESC

raw_command:
esql 'FROM logs-system.auth-*
| WHERE @timestamp >= "2026-05-25T13:38:00Z" AND @timestamp < "2026-05-25T13:53:00Z"
        AND host.name == "db-1" AND event.outcome == "failure"
| STATS failed = COUNT(*),
        distinct_srcs = COUNT_DISTINCT(source.ip),
        first_seen = MIN(@timestamp),
        last_seen  = MAX(@timestamp)
        BY user.name
| SORT failed DESC'
payload_digest: 3 rows; db-1 incident window failed-auth burst by user; dev.dana: 128 failed, 2 distinct srcs
